label: memory • empty store: the model must not fabricate a remembered fact
query: What is the name of my boat? If you don't know, say you don't know.
notes: The negative fixture: nothing is seeded, so a correct answer admits not knowing. answerMustNotContain pins the codewords used by the sibling cases — a run-order contamination bug (store not reset between cases) or a fabricating model both fail here. Off-CI (needs a model).
